from_agent.description: Deprecated — derived automatically from the API key. Accepted for backward compatibility but ignored by the server.

deadline_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC datetime after which the intent is automatically transitioned to TIMED_OUT.

remind_after_seconds.description: Seconds after submission before the first reminder is sent to the human holder.

remind_interval_seconds.description: Seconds between subsequent reminders after the first.

max_reminders.description: Maximum number of reminders before escalating.

escalate_to.description: Agent address or role alias to escalate to once max_reminders is reached.

max_delivery_attempts.description: Maximum delivery failures before transitioning to FAILED.

human_task.description: Structured task description shown to the human when the intent is assigned to a human participant.

task_type.description: Semantic type of the human task. Determines the expected interaction pattern.

allowed_outcomes.description: Permitted values for outcome in task_result. If set, resume will be rejected if outcome is not in this list.

required_comment.description: When true, task_result.comment must be non-empty for the resume to be accepted.

assignees.description: Email addresses or org_member_ids of humans who may respond to this task.

evidence_required.description: When true, task_result must include a non-empty data.evidence field.

form_schema.description: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for validating task_result submitted by the human.
